recommendations.title: Secondhand Lions
recommendations.overview: The comedic adventures of an introverted boy left on the doorstep of a pair of reluctant, eccentric great-uncles, whose exotic remembrances stir the boy's spirit and re-ignite the men's lives.

recommendations.title: Anne of Green Gables
recommendations.overview: A retelling of L.M. Montgomery's story of Anne Shirley, an orphan who is accidentally sent to a couple looking to adopt a boy instead.

recommendations.title: I Believe
recommendations.overview: A 9 year old boy experiences God's power in a supernatural way.

recommendations.title: Arthur
recommendations.overview: Arthur is a 30-year-old child who will inherit $750 million if he complies with his family's demands and marries the woman of their choosing.

recommendations.title: Under Her Control
recommendations.overview: When a fashion employee thinks she will have to end her promising career after getting pregnant, her boss offers to adopt the child.

recommendations.title: Patrik, Age 1.5
recommendations.overview: Göran and Sven have been cleared for adoption and they have a possibility to adopt a swedish orphan, Patrik 1,5. But when Patrik arrives he turns out to be someone else, not the little boy they were expecting. A comma had been misplaced, and in comes

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: Bye Bye Morons
recommendations.overview: When 43-year-old hairdresser Suze Trappet finds out that she's seriously ill, she decides to go looking for a child she was forced to abandon when she was only 15. On her madcap bureaucratic quest she crosses paths with JB, a 50-year-old man in the m

recommendations.title: Any Day Now
recommendations.overview: In the late 1970s, when a mentally handicapped teenager is abandoned, a gay couple takes him in and becomes the family he's never had. But once the unconventional living arrangement is discovered by authorities, the men must fight the legal system to

recommendations.title: Instructions Not Included
recommendations.overview: Valentin is Acapulco's resident playboy, until a former fling leaves a baby on his doorstep and him heading with her out of Mexico.
